purpose: Complete ground-floor technical mesh: exact validated CAD walls and columns, all 17 source-bound openings, eight selectable room floors, open transitions and exact stair plan context.

coordinate_system.axis: Mesh data stores source X/Y on ground plane and Z as display height; WebGL viewer remaps to Three.js X/Z ground plane with Y up

topology_closure.reason: same exact drafting gap in ground- and first-floor CAD stair views

rules: No old cube model or provisional opening panel is included.
The 107 validated CAD wall/column objects remain unchanged in plan geometry.
All seven exact concrete-column objects remain separate structural objects; only their editable interior plaster preview replaces the dark CAD hatch color.
Wall infills below sills and above heads use each exact wall-leaf gap.
Curved openings use source-backed vertical profiles instead of rectangular cuts.
Y17 is five exact plan segments with equal 2.55 m height and a horizontal transom.
Y01 lower mullion, exact springline transom and three radial kleinhouten are mapped from facade CAD linework.
Y01-Y04 preserve their exact isolated elevation-CAD detail linework and source IDs as facade overlays.
Only wall leaves sharing an exact CAD outer-boundary segment receive the Beerse-klinker facade material role.
The 30 cm blue-hardstone plinth is a separate 1 cm recessed finish derived from those exact exterior CAD leaves.
Frames and glass are separate selectable objects for later material replacement.
The ground-to-first stair uses exact plan tread polygons and exact section AB rise/thickness levels.
